results.title: Pixlie: AI video studio: text & image to video, with real control
results.content:
We're scheduling our Product Hunt launch for Pixlie an AI video studio: text/image to video, cloud queue, shared library, web + iOS.

Solo founder, live product (not waitlist). Before we go live I'd love input from this community:

1) What would make you actually use an AI video tool weekly?

2) Must-have vs nice-to-have: control knobs, templates, batch export?

0

results.title: Kozy: The First AI Video Editor | Product Hunt
results.content:
What do you think? …

Tunde Alao
Kozy

Kozy

I've spent hundreds of hours editing videos this past year. I wished I had someone to edit those videos for me and come back with quality results, fast.  
  
I built Kozy Studio to be that “someone”.  
  
Here’s what it allows you to do:  
- Upload your video and ask for an edit.  
- It pick the best parts to combine into a video.  
- Adds text overlays that keeps viewers hooked.  
- Creates ads from scratch.  
- Cuts long-form to shorts.  
  
Would love to know your thoughts :)

Rags
Jo

Jo [...] Erliza. P

Kozy being branded as 'The First AI Video Editor' is an intriguing claim. From a technical perspective, what are the core AI functionalities distinguishing it from other non-linear editors that incorporate AI-powered features (e.g., smart object tracking, automated transcription)? Specifically, is it leveraging generative AI for scene creation, automated editing based on content analysis, or perhaps advanced machine learning for predictive editing workflows? Understanding its unique AI paradigm would be key to evaluating its true innovation.

Supa Liu

@tundealao Congratulations on this fantastic launch! Fast, high-quality results—perfect for anyone looking to save time while maintaining top-notch content.

Tunde Alao
Kozy

Kozy

Appreciate it @supa\_l !

Robert Magrino [...] Kozy
